title: Dragon Quest, Erdrick's Equipment and The Sword of Light
description: Embrace the legacy of the Legendary Hero, Erdrick, with this mod adding his iconic gear from the classic Dragon Quest/Warrior series to Minecraft!
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/924567/description_a053f4b6-ab59-4dac-88d8-d81baebe68a9.png)

Brand new Discord server to better engage with the community

**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FF3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**
  
Embrace the legacy of the Legendary Hero, Erdrick, with this mod adding his iconic gear from the classic Dragon Quest/Warrior series to Minecraft!  
  

Wield Erdrick's legendary swords, emblazoned with runes of power. Use them to call down lightning with the Zap spell against your foes!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1f4iKt1D-Zg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  
Protect yourself and allies against danger with Erdrick's unbreakable shield, bearing the iconic crest.

Don the mythical armor set passed down by generations of heroes. When fully equipped, grants a unique full set effect.  
  
To begin crafting this heroic equipment, you will need to hunt down the heavenly Orichalcum mineral, found within ancient fallen meteorites buried underground.  
  

Seeking adventure? Hunt down elusive Metal Slimes across the land and be rewarded with a king's ransom of experience points!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AH9owbhIOtc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  

Inspired by the brilliant Akira Toriyama's artwork, this mod brings to life the essence of Erdrick for you to mold your own legacy.  
Craft the legend yourself and walk in Erdrick's footsteps on your own epic quest!  

My Other Mods:

[Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zelda-legend-of-the-master-sword)

[Demon Slayer Swords](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demon-slayer-swords)

  
  
**Includes JEI Integration**  
**Requires playerAnimator mod and its associated dependencies.  
Requires GeckoLib**  
**Compatible with Better Combat  
  
  
**Your gift of as little as a cup of coffee will help fund continued development and support for this mod, my other mods and future mods.**
